featureDetection.rationale: Probes anchor positioning and experimental features to update support notification status.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Menu popovers display cleanly with standard default alignments if the engine lacks flip-block capabilities.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Provides an interactive, scrollable window displaying 4 independent menus, enabling real-time testing of boundary conditions.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Very practical dropdown chevron flip and component theme styling demo.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Adheres nicely to CSS variables and retains strong AA contrast matches.

references.rationale: Correctly includes the chromestatus.com/feature/5177580990496768 reference link.
